The Shop Equipment

Reliable machines that power the builds.

  • Fanuc Robodrill Mate: High-speed 3-axis CNC machining.
  • Manual Support: Precision workholding, metrology, and tooling.
  • CAD/CAM: Full integration with Fusion 360 for rapid iteration.

About the Shop

Got Chips LLC is an engineering-focused shop built around curiosity and precision. I believe in clear communication, practical engineering, and making real parts that work in the real world.
